title: Fortinet (FTNT) Surpasses Q3 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Fortinet (FTNT) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 22.22% and 2.37%, respectively, for the quarter ended September 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Fortinet stock sinks after earnings as billings forecast underwhelms
text: Shares of Fortinet Inc. FTNT, -5.65% were off more than 13% in after-hours trading Wednesday after the cybersecurity company topped expectations with its latest earnings and revenue numbers but delivered a billings forecast for the current period that came up light. The company logged third-quarter net income of $231.6 million, or 29 cents a share, up from $163.1 million, or 19 cents a share, in the year-earlier period.
